query: INSERT INTO kb_ingestion_records (resource_id, source_uri, source_mimetype, conversion_tool, conversion_version, fetched_at, converted_at, source_hash) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5, now(), now(), $6) ON CONFLICT (resource_id) DO UPDATE SET source_uri = EXCLUDED.source_uri, source_mimetype = EXCLUDED.source_mimetype, conversion_tool = EXCLUDED.conversion_tool, conversion_version = EXCLUDED.conversion_version, converted_at = now(), source_hash = EXCLUDED.source_hash
